explanation.note: These percentages represent typical contributions to Urban Heat Island (UHI) effect based on scientific literature and model predictions.
explanation.urbanExpansion: NDBI-based built-up area expansion contributes ~45% to UHI
explanation.vegetationLoss: NDVI-based vegetation loss contributes ~30% to UHI
explanation.climateBaseline: Background climate warming contributes ~25% to UHI
explanation.riskProbability: Based on Gradient Boosting model R² score (0.621) and predicted warming trend (+0.4°C/year)
